title: LRC - JUIT
content: Information Search The LRC staff has been getting frequent requests for arranging full-texts of various articles which are not subscribed by the institute. To streamline the system, we have come up with an ‘Information Search Request Form’, which is available at the circulation counter in the Library. PG students (PhD./M.Tech./M.Sc.) can submit the form directly in the library, whereas UG students (B.Tech./B.Sc.) need to get it signed from the concerned faculty/guide, so that LRC staff may devote their time to searching authenticated requests only. The users engaged in research work in the form of projects, paper writing, etc can avail of this specialized service by filling up the aforesaid form at: Information Search Request Form
